scale_note: Scale 0-100. 69 = the critical stupidity line. The higher, the more Idiocracy.

world.label: We crossed the 69 line. Brawndo won.
world.headline: The planet sets a new record: cage fights, viral conspiracies, and leaders governing by meme.

spotlight.headline: UFC fight staged on the White House lawn for Trump's 80th birthday
spotlight.why: An octagon in front of the Oval Office, 'USA! USA!' chants, and a president hyping the bout. President Camacho couldn't have done it better.

countries.name: United States
countries.headline: Trump plans a UFC fight on the White House lawn — staged around his 80th birthday.
countries.why: Governance as pay-per-view, science replaced by posts, brute-force spectacle worthy of President Camacho.
